jobs.title: Freelance Full-Stack Web App Developer
jobs.reason: The role is fully remote and worldwide, but the 'at least 3 years of relevant experience' requirement conflicts with the candidate's junior/entry-level profile.
jobs.summary: This is a freelance, fully remote Full-Stack Web App Developer role for the Tendem project, requiring experience with JavaScript/TypeScript and Python/Node.js, along with frontend frameworks like React/Next.js and databases. You will build interactive web applications and potentially standalone Python scripts, integrating AI/LLM services.

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.reason: This is a strong match as it's a junior-level, fully remote, worldwide position with a highly relevant tech stack including JavaScript, React, Next.js, and NLP/AI concepts.
jobs.cover_note: I am excited to apply for the Frontend Developer position at Quinncia Inc. As a junior developer with a strong foundation in JavaScript, React.js, and Next.js, I am eager to contribute to enhancing your AI-powered career readiness platform. My projects, such as Cupid, demonstrate my ability to build engaging e-commerce experiences with React and Node.js, and my work with NLP and LLMs aligns perfectly with Quinncia's mission to improve student outcomes. I am a proactive learner, passionate about building high-quality user experiences, and confident in my ability to quickly adapt to new technologies and contribute meaningfully to your team's success.
checklist: Tailored CV highlighting relevant frontend skills and projects.
GitHub profile link (ensure it's prominently displayed).
Portfolio link (if available, showcasing frontend projects).
Confirmation of availability for full-time work and adherence to EST working hours.
Answers to any specific questions Quinncia may ask on Wellfound.

jobs.title: Junior Front End Developer
jobs.reason: The job requires the candidate to be based in the MENA region and has a location field indicating Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, which contradicts the candidate's requirement for a worldwide, no-country-restriction remote role.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer React and AWS
jobs.reason: The job requires 5+ years of experience, is not fully remote worldwide, and has strict work authorization requirements, making it a poor fit for a junior candidate.

jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
jobs.reason: The job listing is for a Senior AI Engineer, requiring 3+ years of experience, which directly contradicts the candidate's junior/entry-level status and lack of commercial experience.
